overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing exploration of the Hufflepuff common room. The player character walks through the cozy, plant-filled underground common room with round doors and wooden beams, passing other students relaxing in armchairs, then ascends to an upper level dormitory.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a small antechamber with a striped sofa and globe. The character walks forward through a large round wooden archway, transitioning from the enclosed entry space toward the main common room area.

segments.scene_description: The character enters the spacious circular common room with a high ceiling and wooden balcony above. The room features ornate round doors with stained glass, potted trees, and several students relaxing in armchairs. The character walks along the perimeter, passing groups of conversing students.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor and curved wooden staircase to upper level

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the main common room through a corridor with exposed brick walls, then ascends a grand curved wooden staircase. The environment shifts from the open circular room to an enclosed stairwell with wooden beams and wall sconces.

events.description: entering the dormitory room from the upper corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the upper balcony corridor, with views down to the main common room through the wooden railing. The corridor features stained glass doors and potted plants, leading toward the dormitory entrance.

events.description: turning around to exit the dormitory after exploring

agents.ego_description: walking around the dormitory room, examining the four-poster beds and furniture, then heading back toward the exit

wooden four-poster bed with white bedding

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy dormitory room with multiple four-poster beds, wooden wardrobes, and arched windows letting in soft natural light. After briefly exploring the room and examining the furniture, the character turns to exit back to the corridor.

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper corridor with views of the main common room below and hanging plants along the walls

planter with bright red flowers

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dormitory and walks back along the upper balcony corridor. The corridor features views down to the main common room below, hanging plants, and potted flowers, with wooden archways leading to other areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a small, enclosed antechamber through the expansive Hufflepuff common room and up into the private dormitory quarters. It begins in a cozy entry space with a striped sofa and globe, moving through a large round wooden archway to reveal a spacious circular room filled with potted trees, stained glass, and students relaxing in armchairs. The scene then shifts from this open area into a brick-walled corridor, where the camera ascends a grand curved wooden staircase toward an upper balcony overlooking the main hall. As the character moves along this elevated walkway past hanging plants, the environment transitions into a sunlit dormitory featuring four-poster beds and wooden wardrobes. Finally, the camera turns away from the bedroom to re-emerge into the balcony corridor, passing wooden archways and floral arrangements while maintaining a view of the common room below.
